# Torn Training Optimizer

> A free, privacy-first web app that helps players of the online game Torn (torn.com)
> optimize gym training. It reads a player's stats, gym dots and perks via the official
> Torn API and computes, for each battle stat, the best gym to use, the optimal training
> method, the cheapest energy plan, what it costs to unlock the next gym, and a multi-day
> stat projection — using the game's validated gym-gain formula.

Website: https://torntraining.com

## What it does
- Optimal training plan per battle stat (Strength, Defense, Speed, Dexterity): it picks
  the method by stat level — happy jumps win at low stats, but plain energy training wins
  once stats are high (stacking energy for a jump wastes regeneration), so it does not tell
  high-stat players to chase 99k happy jumps.
- Auto-detects the player's gym-gain modifier (M) per stat from their perks, with a breakdown.
- Best gym a player can actually use per stat, respecting unlocked gyms (gym EXP) and the
  specialist-gym requirements (Balboas, Frontline, Mr. Isoyamas, The Elites, Sports Science Lab, etc.).
- Economics: cheapest energy by $/energy and a daily energy capacity view that accounts for
  the shared drug cooldown — so it does not call LSD "cheaper" when Xanax gives 5x the energy
  per cooldown slot.
- Budget optimizer: the best items to buy under a money budget for the most gains.
- Unlock planner: how much energy, money and days to unlock a specific gym or reach a target stat.
- Multi-day stat projection chart and progress tracking (snapshot stats over time, compare
  real gains to the formula's prediction).

## Key facts
- Free, no ads, not affiliated with Torn or Torn.com.
- The player's Torn API key stays in their browser and is only ever sent to api.torn.com.
  There is no server, no database and no account; nothing is stored remotely.
- Read-only; a Torn "Limited" access key is sufficient.
- Uses the standard Torn gym-gain (Vladar) formula, validated against real in-game trains to
  about 0.1%. Community-reported but unconfirmed mechanics (such as the rumoured ~50M stat-growth
  cap) are flagged in the tool and not silently baked into the maths.

## Related / similar tools
TornStats, YATA, Torn Tools. Torn Training Optimizer is narrower and focused specifically on
gym-training optimization, with a privacy-first (client-side, no server) design.
